note: Freeway paused platform services tied to Supercharger withdrawals and buy-backs.
Freeway had marketed Supercharger rewards of up to 43%.
FWT dropped by more than 70% after the service halt.
Daily Hodl reported an over-80% FWT collapse after the halt.
Freeway's restart language depended on future recommencement of partial and full services.
CoinMarketCap described Superchargers as simulations of major crypto and fiat currencies.
AscendEX announced FWT delisting and a later withdrawal suspension date.
